title: MCP
serversHint: Connect MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Connecting a server makes its tools available to the agent as MCP_<Server>_<Tool>, each asking for approval by default.
name: Name
oauthHint: Registers automatically — no app setup needed. You'll authorize in your browser on connect (e.g. Supabase).
oauthAppHint: For servers that need a pre-registered app (e.g. GitHub): create an OAuth App with callback URL {{uri}}, then paste its Client ID and secret. You'll authorize in your browser on connect.
